members.name: AddCustomDataLayer
members.summary: Adds a custom data layer to the TileSet at the given position [param to_position] in the array. If [param to_position] is -1, adds it at the end of the array. Custom data layers allow assigning custom properties to atlas tiles.

members.name: AddNavigationLayer
members.summary: Adds a navigation layer to the TileSet at the given position [param to_position] in the array. If [param to_position] is -1, adds it at the end of the array. Navigation layers allow assigning a navigable area to atlas tiles.

members.name: AddOcclusionLayer
members.summary: Adds an occlusion layer to the TileSet at the given position [param to_position] in the array. If [param to_position] is -1, adds it at the end of the array. Occlusion layers allow assigning occlusion polygons to atlas tiles.

members.name: AddPattern
members.signature: public int AddPattern(TileMapPattern pattern, int index)
members.summary: Adds a [TileMapPattern] to be stored in the TileSet resource. If provided, insert it at the given [param index].

members.name: AddPhysicsLayer
members.summary: Adds a physics layer to the TileSet at the given position [param to_position] in the array. If [param to_position] is -1, adds it at the end of the array. Physics layers allow assigning collision polygons to atlas tiles.

members.name: AddSource
members.signature: public int AddSource(TileSetSource source, int atlasSourceIdOverride)
members.summary: Adds a [TileSetSource] to the TileSet. If [param atlas_source_id_override] is not -1, also set its source ID. Otherwise, a unique identifier is automatically generated. The function returns the added source ID or -1 if the source could not be added. [b]Warning:[/b] A source cannot belong to two TileSets at the same time. If the added source was attached to another [TileSet], it will be removed from that one.

members.name: AddTerrain
members.signature: public void AddTerrain(int terrainSet, int toPosition)
members.summary: Adds a new terrain to the given terrain set [param terrain_set] at the given position [param to_position] in the array. If [param to_position] is -1, adds it at the end of the array.

members.name: AddTerrainSet
members.summary: Adds a new terrain set at the given position [param to_position] in the array. If [param to_position] is -1, adds it at the end of the array.

members.name: CleanupInvalidTileProxies
members.summary: Clears tile proxies pointing to invalid tiles.

members.name: ClearTerrains
members.summary: Clears all terrain properties for the given terrain set.

members.name: ClearTileProxies
members.summary: Clears all tile proxies.

members.name: GetAlternativeLevelTileProxy
members.signature: public Array GetAlternativeLevelTileProxy(int sourceFrom, Vector2i coordsFrom, int alternativeFrom)
members.summary: Returns the alternative-level proxy for the given identifiers. The returned array contains the three proxie's target identifiers (source ID, atlas coords ID and alternative tile ID). If the TileSet has no proxy for the given identifiers, returns an empty Array.

members.name: GetCoordsLevelTileProxy
members.signature: public Array GetCoordsLevelTileProxy(int sourceFrom, Vector2i coordsFrom)
members.summary: Returns the coordinate-level proxy for the given identifiers. The returned array contains the two target identifiers of the proxy (source ID and atlas coordinates ID). If the TileSet has no proxy for the given identifiers, returns an empty Array.

members.name: GetCustomDataLayerByName
members.summary: Returns the index of the custom data layer identified by the given name.

members.name: GetCustomDataLayerName
members.summary: Returns the name of the custom data layer identified by the given index.

members.name: GetCustomDataLayerType
members.summary: Returns the type of the custom data layer identified by the given index.

members.name: GetCustomDataLayersCount
members.summary: Returns the custom data layers count.

members.name: GetNavigationLayerLayerValue
members.signature: public bool GetNavigationLayerLayerValue(int layerIndex, int layerNumber)
members.summary: Returns whether or not the specified navigation layer of the TileSet navigation data layer identified by the given [param layer_index] is enabled, given a navigation_layers [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: GetNavigationLayerLayers
members.summary: Returns the navigation layers (as in the Navigation server) of the given TileSet navigation layer.

members.name: GetNavigationLayersCount
members.summary: Returns the navigation layers count.

members.name: GetNextSourceId
members.summary: Returns a new unused source ID. This generated ID is the same that a call to [method add_source] would return.

members.name: GetOcclusionLayerLightMask
members.summary: Returns the light mask of the occlusion layer.

members.name: GetOcclusionLayerSdfCollision
members.summary: Returns if the occluders from this layer use [code]sdf_collision[/code].

members.name: GetOcclusionLayersCount
members.summary: Returns the occlusion layers count.

members.name: GetPattern
members.summary: Returns the [TileMapPattern] at the given [param index].

members.name: GetPatternsCount
members.summary: Returns the number of [TileMapPattern] this tile set handles.

members.name: GetPhysicsLayerCollisionLayer
members.summary: Returns the collision layer (as in the physics server) bodies on the given TileSet's physics layer are in.

members.name: GetPhysicsLayerCollisionMask
members.summary: Returns the collision mask of bodies on the given TileSet's physics layer.

members.name: GetPhysicsLayerCollisionPriority
members.summary: Returns the collision priority of bodies on the given TileSet's physics layer.

members.name: GetPhysicsLayerPhysicsMaterial
members.summary: Returns the physics material of bodies on the given TileSet's physics layer.

members.name: GetPhysicsLayersCount
members.summary: Returns the physics layers count.

members.name: GetSource
members.summary: Returns the [TileSetSource] with ID [param source_id].

members.name: GetSourceCount
members.summary: Returns the number of [TileSetSource] in this TileSet.

members.name: GetSourceId
members.summary: Returns the source ID for source with index [param index].

members.name: GetSourceLevelTileProxy
members.summary: Returns the source-level proxy for the given source identifier. If the TileSet has no proxy for the given identifier, returns -1.

members.name: GetTerrainColor
members.signature: public Color GetTerrainColor(int terrainSet, int terrainIndex)
members.summary: Returns a terrain's color.

members.name: GetTerrainName
members.signature: public String GetTerrainName(int terrainSet, int terrainIndex)
members.summary: Returns a terrain's name.

members.name: GetTerrainSetMode
members.summary: Returns a terrain set mode.

members.name: GetTerrainSetsCount
members.summary: Returns the terrain sets count.

members.name: GetTerrainsCount
members.summary: Returns the number of terrains in the given terrain set.

members.name: HasAlternativeLevelTileProxy
members.signature: public bool HasAlternativeLevelTileProxy(int sourceFrom, Vector2i coordsFrom, int alternativeFrom)
members.summary: Returns if there is an alternative-level proxy for the given identifiers.

members.name: HasCoordsLevelTileProxy
members.signature: public bool HasCoordsLevelTileProxy(int sourceFrom, Vector2i coordsFrom)
members.summary: Returns if there is a coodinates-level proxy for the given identifiers.

members.name: HasCustomDataLayerByName
members.summary: Returns if there is a custom data layer named [param layer_name].

members.name: HasSource
members.summary: Returns if this TileSet has a source for the given source ID.

members.name: HasSourceLevelTileProxy
members.summary: Returns if there is a source-level proxy for the given source ID.

members.name: MapTileProxy
members.signature: public Array MapTileProxy(int sourceFrom, Vector2i coordsFrom, int alternativeFrom)
members.summary: According to the configured proxies, maps the provided identifiers to a new set of identifiers. The source ID, atlas coordinates ID and alternative tile ID are returned as a 3 elements Array. This function first look for matching alternative-level proxies, then coordinates-level proxies, then source-level proxies. If no proxy corresponding to provided identifiers are found, returns the same values the ones used as arguments.

members.name: MoveCustomDataLayer
members.signature: public void MoveCustomDataLayer(int layerIndex, int toPosition)
members.summary: Moves the custom data layer at index [param layer_index] to the given position [param to_position] in the array. Also updates the atlas tiles accordingly.

members.name: MoveNavigationLayer
members.signature: public void MoveNavigationLayer(int layerIndex, int toPosition)
members.summary: Moves the navigation layer at index [param layer_index] to the given position [param to_position] in the array. Also updates the atlas tiles accordingly.

members.name: MoveOcclusionLayer
members.signature: public void MoveOcclusionLayer(int layerIndex, int toPosition)
members.summary: Moves the occlusion layer at index [param layer_index] to the given position [param to_position] in the array. Also updates the atlas tiles accordingly.

members.name: MovePhysicsLayer
members.signature: public void MovePhysicsLayer(int layerIndex, int toPosition)
members.summary: Moves the physics layer at index [param layer_index] to the given position [param to_position] in the array. Also updates the atlas tiles accordingly.

members.name: MoveTerrain
members.signature: public void MoveTerrain(int terrainSet, int terrainIndex, int toPosition)
members.summary: Moves the terrain at index [param terrain_index] for terrain set [param terrain_set] to the given position [param to_position] in the array. Also updates the atlas tiles accordingly.

members.name: MoveTerrainSet
members.signature: public void MoveTerrainSet(int terrainSet, int toPosition)
members.summary: Moves the terrain set at index [param terrain_set] to the given position [param to_position] in the array. Also updates the atlas tiles accordingly.

members.name: RemoveAlternativeLevelTileProxy
members.signature: public void RemoveAlternativeLevelTileProxy(int sourceFrom, Vector2i coordsFrom, int alternativeFrom)
members.summary: Removes an alternative-level proxy for the given identifiers.

members.name: RemoveCoordsLevelTileProxy
members.signature: public void RemoveCoordsLevelTileProxy(int sourceFrom, Vector2i coordsFrom)
members.summary: Removes a coordinates-level proxy for the given identifiers.

members.name: RemoveCustomDataLayer
members.summary: Removes the custom data layer at index [param layer_index]. Also updates the atlas tiles accordingly.

members.name: RemoveNavigationLayer
members.summary: Removes the navigation layer at index [param layer_index]. Also updates the atlas tiles accordingly.

members.name: RemoveOcclusionLayer
members.summary: Removes the occlusion layer at index [param layer_index]. Also updates the atlas tiles accordingly.

members.name: RemovePattern
members.summary: Remove the [TileMapPattern] at the given index.

members.name: RemovePhysicsLayer
members.summary: Removes the physics layer at index [param layer_index]. Also updates the atlas tiles accordingly.

members.name: RemoveSource
members.summary: Removes the source with the given source ID.

members.name: RemoveSourceLevelTileProxy
members.summary: Removes a source-level tile proxy.

members.name: RemoveTerrain
members.signature: public void RemoveTerrain(int terrainSet, int terrainIndex)
members.summary: Removes the terrain at index [param terrain_index] in the given terrain set [param terrain_set]. Also updates the atlas tiles accordingly.

members.name: RemoveTerrainSet
members.summary: Removes the terrain set at index [param terrain_set]. Also updates the atlas tiles accordingly.

members.name: SetAlternativeLevelTileProxy
members.signature: public void SetAlternativeLevelTileProxy(int sourceFrom, Vector2i coordsFrom, int alternativeFrom, int sourceTo, Vector2i coordsTo, int alternativeTo)
members.summary: Create an alternative-level proxy for the given identifiers. A proxy will map set of tile identifiers to another set of identifiers. Proxied tiles can be automatically replaced in TileMapLayer nodes using the editor.

members.name: SetCoordsLevelTileProxy
members.signature: public void SetCoordsLevelTileProxy(int sourceFrom, Vector2i coordsFrom, int sourceTo, Vector2i coordsTo)
members.summary: Creates a coordinates-level proxy for the given identifiers. A proxy will map set of tile identifiers to another set of identifiers. The alternative tile ID is kept the same when using coordinates-level proxies. Proxied tiles can be automatically replaced in TileMapLayer nodes using the editor.

members.name: SetCustomDataLayerName
members.signature: public void SetCustomDataLayerName(int layerIndex, String layerName)
members.summary: Sets the name of the custom data layer identified by the given index. Names are identifiers of the layer therefore if the name is already taken it will fail and raise an error.

members.name: SetCustomDataLayerType
members.signature: public void SetCustomDataLayerType(int layerIndex, int layerType)
members.summary: Sets the type of the custom data layer identified by the given index.

members.name: SetNavigationLayerLayerValue
members.signature: public void SetNavigationLayerLayerValue(int layerIndex, int layerNumber, bool value)
members.summary: Based on [param value], enables or disables the specified navigation layer of the TileSet navigation data layer identified by the given [param layer_index], given a navigation_layers [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: SetNavigationLayerLayers
members.signature: public void SetNavigationLayerLayers(int layerIndex, int layers)
members.summary: Sets the navigation layers (as in the navigation server) for navigation regions in the given TileSet navigation layer.

members.name: SetOcclusionLayerLightMask
members.signature: public void SetOcclusionLayerLightMask(int layerIndex, int lightMask)
members.summary: Sets the occlusion layer (as in the rendering server) for occluders in the given TileSet occlusion layer.

members.name: SetOcclusionLayerSdfCollision
members.signature: public void SetOcclusionLayerSdfCollision(int layerIndex, bool sdfCollision)
members.summary: Enables or disables SDF collision for occluders in the given TileSet occlusion layer.

members.name: SetPhysicsLayerCollisionLayer
members.signature: public void SetPhysicsLayerCollisionLayer(int layerIndex, int layer)
members.summary: Sets the collision layer (as in the physics server) for bodies in the given TileSet physics layer.

members.name: SetPhysicsLayerCollisionMask
members.signature: public void SetPhysicsLayerCollisionMask(int layerIndex, int mask)
members.summary: Sets the collision mask for bodies in the given TileSet physics layer.

members.name: SetPhysicsLayerCollisionPriority
members.signature: public void SetPhysicsLayerCollisionPriority(int layerIndex, float priority)
members.summary: Sets the collision priority for bodies in the given TileSet physics layer.

members.name: SetPhysicsLayerPhysicsMaterial
members.signature: public void SetPhysicsLayerPhysicsMaterial(int layerIndex, PhysicsMaterial physicsMaterial)
members.summary: Sets the physics material for bodies in the given TileSet physics layer.

members.name: SetSourceId
members.signature: public void SetSourceId(int sourceId, int newSourceId)
members.summary: Changes a source's ID.

members.name: SetSourceLevelTileProxy
members.signature: public void SetSourceLevelTileProxy(int sourceFrom, int sourceTo)
members.summary: Creates a source-level proxy for the given source ID. A proxy will map set of tile identifiers to another set of identifiers. Both the atlas coordinates ID and the alternative tile ID are kept the same when using source-level proxies. Proxied tiles can be automatically replaced in TileMapLayer nodes using the editor.

members.name: SetTerrainColor
members.signature: public void SetTerrainColor(int terrainSet, int terrainIndex, Color color)
members.summary: Sets a terrain's color. This color is used for identifying the different terrains in the TileSet editor.

members.name: SetTerrainName
members.signature: public void SetTerrainName(int terrainSet, int terrainIndex, String name)
members.summary: Sets a terrain's name.

members.name: SetTerrainSetMode
members.signature: public void SetTerrainSetMode(int terrainSet, int mode)
members.summary: Sets a terrain mode. Each mode determines which bits of a tile shape is used to match the neighboring tiles' terrains.

members.name: TileLayout
members.summary: For all half-offset shapes (Isometric, Hexagonal and Half-Offset square), changes the way tiles are indexed in the [TileMapLayer] grid.

members.name: TileOffsetAxis
members.summary: For all half-offset shapes (Isometric, Hexagonal and Half-Offset square), determines the offset axis.

members.name: TileShape
members.summary: The tile shape.

members.name: TileSize
members.summary: The tile size, in pixels. For all tile shapes, this size corresponds to the encompassing rectangle of the tile shape. This is thus the minimal cell size required in an atlas.

members.name: UvClipping
members.summary: Enables/Disable uv clipping when rendering the tiles.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_BOTTOM_CORNER
values.summary: Neighbor in the bottom corner.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_BOTTOM_LEFT_CORNER
values.summary: Neighbor in the bottom left corner.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_BOTTOM_LEFT_SIDE
values.summary: Neighbor on the bottom left side.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_BOTTOM_RIGHT_CORNER
values.summary: Neighbor in the bottom right corner.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_BOTTOM_RIGHT_SIDE
values.summary: Neighbor on the bottom right side.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_BOTTOM_SIDE
values.summary: Neighbor on the bottom side.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_LEFT_CORNER
values.summary: Neighbor in the left corner.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_LEFT_SIDE
values.summary: Neighbor on the left side.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_RIGHT_CORNER
values.summary: Neighbor in the right corner.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_RIGHT_SIDE
values.summary: Neighbor on the right side.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_TOP_CORNER
values.summary: Neighbor in the top corner.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_TOP_LEFT_CORNER
values.summary: Neighbor in the top left corner.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_TOP_LEFT_SIDE
values.summary: Neighbor on the top left side.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_TOP_RIGHT_CORNER
values.summary: Neighbor in the top right corner.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_TOP_RIGHT_SIDE
values.summary: Neighbor on the top right side.

values.name: CELL_NEIGHBOR_TOP_SIDE
values.summary: Neighbor on the top side.

values.name: TERRAIN_MODE_MATCH_CORNERS
values.summary: Requires corners to match with neighboring tiles' terrains.

values.name: TERRAIN_MODE_MATCH_CORNERS_AND_SIDES
values.summary: Requires both corners and side to match with neighboring tiles' terrains.

values.name: TERRAIN_MODE_MATCH_SIDES
values.summary: Requires sides to match with neighboring tiles' terrains.

values.name: TILE_LAYOUT_DIAMOND_DOWN
values.summary: Tile coordinates layout where the horizontal axis goes down-right, and the vertical one goes down-left.

values.name: TILE_LAYOUT_DIAMOND_RIGHT
values.summary: Tile coordinates layout where the horizontal axis goes up-right, and the vertical one goes down-right.

values.name: TILE_LAYOUT_STACKED
values.summary: Tile coordinates layout where both axis stay consistent with their respective local horizontal and vertical axis.

values.name: TILE_LAYOUT_STACKED_OFFSET
values.summary: Same as [constant TILE_LAYOUT_STACKED], but the first half-offset is negative instead of positive.

values.name: TILE_LAYOUT_STAIRS_DOWN
values.summary: Tile coordinates layout where the vertical axis stay vertical, and the horizontal one goes down-right.

values.name: TILE_LAYOUT_STAIRS_RIGHT
values.summary: Tile coordinates layout where the horizontal axis stay horizontal, and the vertical one goes down-right.

values.name: TILE_OFFSET_AXIS_HORIZONTAL
values.summary: Horizontal half-offset.

values.name: TILE_OFFSET_AXIS_VERTICAL
values.summary: Vertical half-offset.

values.name: TILE_SHAPE_HALF_OFFSET_SQUARE
values.summary: Rectangular tile shape with one row/column out of two offset by half a tile.

values.name: TILE_SHAPE_HEXAGON
values.summary: Hexagonal tile shape.

values.name: TILE_SHAPE_ISOMETRIC
values.summary: Diamond tile shape (for isometric look). [b]Note:[/b] Isometric [TileSet] works best if all sibling [TileMapLayer]s and their parent inheriting from [Node2D] have Y-sort enabled.

values.name: TILE_SHAPE_SQUARE
values.summary: Rectangular tile shape.

constants.name: TILE_SHAPE_SQUARE
constants.summary: Rectangular tile shape.

constants.name: TILE_SHAPE_ISOMETRIC
constants.summary: Diamond tile shape (for isometric look). [b]Note:[/b] Isometric [TileSet] works best if all sibling [TileMapLayer]s and their parent inheriting from [Node2D] have Y-sort enabled.

constants.name: TILE_SHAPE_HALF_OFFSET_SQUARE
constants.summary: Rectangular tile shape with one row/column out of two offset by half a tile.

constants.name: TILE_SHAPE_HEXAGON
constants.summary: Hexagonal tile shape.

constants.name: TILE_LAYOUT_STACKED
constants.summary: Tile coordinates layout where both axis stay consistent with their respective local horizontal and vertical axis.

constants.name: TILE_LAYOUT_STACKED_OFFSET
constants.summary: Same as [constant TILE_LAYOUT_STACKED], but the first half-offset is negative instead of positive.

constants.name: TILE_LAYOUT_STAIRS_RIGHT
constants.summary: Tile coordinates layout where the horizontal axis stay horizontal, and the vertical one goes down-right.

constants.name: TILE_LAYOUT_STAIRS_DOWN
constants.summary: Tile coordinates layout where the vertical axis stay vertical, and the horizontal one goes down-right.

constants.name: TILE_LAYOUT_DIAMOND_RIGHT
constants.summary: Tile coordinates layout where the horizontal axis goes up-right, and the vertical one goes down-right.

constants.name: TILE_LAYOUT_DIAMOND_DOWN
constants.summary: Tile coordinates layout where the horizontal axis goes down-right, and the vertical one goes down-left.

constants.name: TILE_OFFSET_AXIS_HORIZONTAL
constants.summary: Horizontal half-offset.

constants.name: TILE_OFFSET_AXIS_VERTICAL
constants.summary: Vertical half-offset.
